race.comment: Promising mare DOMINANT DARCY (6) went straight from a Class 1 to a Class 3 but coped exceptionally well over this distance at Doomben last start, driving late to just get the verdict. Getting up in the weights but at only her sixth start there is more improvement to come. SPIETHTACULAR (9) led for the judge in DOMINANT DARCY's race at Doomben last time out and was still there until the final bounds. Should control things again and with a 1.5kgs weight turnaround is a chance to exact her revenge. JUST PRECIOUS (7) comes here off a decent effort over this distance at Doomben recently, albeit in midweek company. Ready to peak after three runs back but will need a 10/10 ride from the wide alley. AMUSEANTES (11) can improve on her latest effort after drawing a better gate.
